name: Andrew Gillum
subject: More loopholes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31e0/9e00690/43427dd1/24039654/3993137219/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180124_taxkic_acq_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180124_taxkic_acq_gq_act__AG")
**BREAKING:

Florida House to vote tomorrow on HB 7001 which would require a supermajority to end corporate tax loopholes**

Hello,

**Republicans know a blue wave is coming in Florida** and that when we're in charge, three decades of corporate tax loopholes will be closed to fund teacher pay raises, world-class public schools, and job training programs.

So they're doing everything they can to stop us while they think they still have a chance.

Our state needs progressive investments, not more laws that make it easier for the Republicans to continue giving tax breaks to the richest corporations -- which is why I introduced my "Fair Share for Florida's Future" plan last week.

**[Add your name now and become a citizen co-sponsor of Fair Share for Florida's Future.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31e0/9e00690/43427dd1/24039657/3993137219/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/become-a-citizen-sponsor?utm_campaign=em18_180124_taxkic_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em18_180124_taxkic_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+now+and+become+a+citizen+c")**

HB 7001 may as well be called the "Corporate Tax Loophole Protection Amendment." It's irresponsible, proven to be ineffective in other states, and a blatant power grab by a party who knows their views are out of step with middle-class voters.

My plan will increase teacher pay, rebuild public schools, and expand job trainings through a corporate tax adjustment. The money corporations get thanks to unfair tax rates can work for our middle-class families, but it's going to take all of us demanding it to make that happen.

**[Add your name today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31e0/9e00690/43427dd1/24039656/3993137219/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/become-a-citizen-sponsor?utm_campaign=em18_180124_taxkic_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em18_180124_taxkic_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+today")**

Thank you,

Andrew

| | **New Poll Shows Democrat Joe Donnelly's Support is Slipping**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=347425fcb6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Friends -

A new poll was released yesterday, and it shows that __**Democrat Joe Donnelly is in trouble**__.

When asked if they approve of Democrat Donnelly, more and more Hoosiers are standing up and saying __**NO**__. That's because the more Hoosiers learn about the the real Democrat Donnelly,____the more they know it's time for him to go__.

Together, we're moving that needle of support. According to the national Morning Consult poll, there are now just 14 points separating Donnelly's approval and disapproval ratings. And as you can see from the chart, the direction of that polling __doesn't look good for Democrat Donnelly__.

[**> >Donate NOW to Keep The Needle Moving<< **](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff9f2dc5c3&e=1acd9bb3d6)

It's all a big change from earlier in 2017 -- which proves that __our messaging is working!__ In just the last six months of 2017, Donnelly's net approval rating has also __dropped by a whopping 14 points__!

Polls like this show that Hoosiers are tired of Democrart Donnelly's fairweather record -- claiming he's a moderate, yet voting with his DC party boss Chuck Schumer 85 percent of the time. Hoosiers tired of having a U.S. Senator who's __with us when we don't need him, and against us when we need him most__.

Whether it's his **unwavering support for Obamacare** and **Chuck Shumer** , or his __**atrocious**__ vote against cutting federal taxes for hardworking Hoosiers, Democrart Donnelly continues to show us that he's out of touch on the issues that really matter.

Here at the Indiana Republican Party, we're on the front lines day-in and day-out, keeping Democrart Joe Donnelly accountable. Each time Donnelly does one thing in Washington and says something different in Indiana, we're letting our fellow Hoosiers know.

__**But we can't do it alone, and we can't do it without your support.**__
---

This weekend Donnelly's DC boss Chuck Schumer is [throwing an out-of-state, big-dollar fundraiser for him](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d323977672&e=1acd9bb3d6). Donnelly and his Democrat friends will have deep pockets in 2018, so __**it's critical we have the funds to make sure they don't drown out your voice.**__

Please help us defeat Democrat Joe Donnelly in 2018, and elect a U.S. Senator who will be your voice in Washington. [Please help us win in 2018 by making a donation today](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b1332371c&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Thanks,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

name: The White House
subject: An American in Switzerland
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b4275a5f14baca118b34a19afa014af02d06ac2fabb5ca1d7615e17b129cf5474b3d06a914d7c812aa0c732d09ca495196d50664114c6fba

An American in Switzerland

President Donald J. Trump arrived in Davos, Switzerland, early this morning—one day before he becomes only the second American president to address the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting.

Davos draws some of the world’s most powerful politicians and business leaders. President Trump is attending because he wants to deliver them a message: An “America First” agenda is a great thing for the global economy.

Here’s why:

- America is committed to global growth and prosperity. When the U.S. economy grows, so does the world’s.
- The Trump Administration supports free and open trade—but free trade cannot flourish unless all countries are held accountable to the rules.
- Leaders must reform, not abandon, the international economic system. America’s goal is to make the global economy work for all sovereign nations, not to dismantle it.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b4275a5f14baca11fbcf79cf6fbd900c994ce3bf17667703487d716e39cbf9adc06a639389ea35f7e20f02896b02b47c3e903e01e82d79fb
Read more about what President Trump will do in Switzerland.

Jeff Sessions on President Trump: ‘Promise delivered’

“When President Trump was inaugurated, he made the American people a promise: ‘This American carnage stops right here and stops right now,’” Attorney General Jeff Sessions writes in an op-ed for USA Today.

“It is a promise that he has kept.”

Attorney General Sessions focuses on America’s renewed fight against crime under President Trump. In 2017, the Department of Justice hit more than a few milestones:

- Bringing “cases against more violent criminals than in any year in decades”
- Charging the most firearm prosecutions at the federal level in a decade
- Convicting nearly 500 human traffickers, along with 1,200 gang members
- Witnessing the first decline in the number of officers killed on duty since 2013

The Attorney General’s parting thought: “Crime rates are not like the tides — we can help change them. And under Trump’s strong leadership, we will.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b4275a5f14baca113e4cfdad4d4d29aac141690ef4cc21a5b6f27f37ca516673a9514a22a03455e44595cf8a0e567a1a1426ce72e878eb3c
Read the op-ed from Attorney General Jeff Sessions.

More than 100 mayors come to the White House

Yesterday, President Trump met with more than 100 mayors from across the country in the East Room of the White House. The bipartisan group represented communities both urban and rural, and they joined in a panel discussion with housing, transportation, and development experts from across the Administration.

“We have some really hardworking people in this room,” President Trump told attendees before reiterating the White House’s commitment to supporting local government. He emphasized that America’s economic comeback is translating into record-low unemployment for women, African-Americans, and Hispanics.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b4275a5f14baca11d7caa55aeee0cea643e90f50cdcb2ddd2e40158f768f485e3029fc584706d983a2e5d5009ac5ef00c6734a43592ea4d9
Read more: “You're very, very important to the future of this country.”

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump arrives in Switzerland | January 25, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

Last night, President Trump arrived in Davos, Switzerland, to attend the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting.

This morning, he is participating in bilateral meetings with the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and the Prime Minister of the State of Israel at the World Economic Forum Congress Centre.

Later, he will meet with Klaus Schwab, founder and Executive Chairman of the World Economic Forum, followed by a dinner with European business leaders.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b4275a5f14baca1121367e96a1ad7f954493fb246badec23a65419fd5d5598ec0dca47c6303a335aa5a0f9c8e71141670d95e47689af8031
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b4275a5f14baca11fd42481ddf36b8f393274f5436cebcbca113d9cd3280b3b374d585517aa3f53d469237e41b9820cbd1dbba2ca72cfe53
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4eb3b795a8dd7141d6e941151a70dec1342c3cee397edcc392f73b9202fcd84a28e6697a8590a9c418d77eab7e88dd702

body:
| [](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signature_drive&n=1)
---
Peter --

Thank you for signing up to help Corey Stewart get on the ballot to defeat Tim Kaine. We're only one week away from our **_end of month signature deadline_** - January 31st! There are TWO opportunities to win prizes for helping Corey get on the ballot. 1) Win a FREE Corey Stewart Bumper Sticker and t-shirt! 2) FIVE volunteers will win a FREE STEAK DINNER at Corey's home. You must enter here >>> [Dinner_with_Corey](https://www.coreystewart.com/834/dinnerwithcorey?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signature_drive&n=2) By now, you should've heard from your regional director about collecting signatures and getting Corey on the ballot. In case you haven't, or needed a refresher, print out your petition forms and check out the instructions on collecting ballot signatures below: Download your ballot petition signature form [HERE](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.coreystewart.com%2Fpdf%2Fstewart_pqv.pdf%3Froi%3Decho3-48663971534-45737710-dd6a78e35db9dd6518ab51bdd4b78b80%26&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signature_drive&n=3) \- * **_must print front and back on the same page!_**
Download and read your instructions [HERE](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.coreystewart.com%2Fpdf%2FStewart-01022018.pdf&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signature_drive&n=4).
* Make sure to read the instructions carefully.
* Then, ask your family, friends, and co-workers to sign the petition.
* Go to your local Farmers Market, Grocery Store, or anywhere there's foot traffic to collect signatures.
* Get 10, 25, or even 50 by the end of the month!
* Get your signature forms notarized at your local bank or post office.
* Mail in your signatures by the end of one of our deadlines!
* Mail petition forms to the campaign P.O. Box or turn into your local Regional Director.

Stewart for Senate
P.O. Box 7090
Woodbridge, VA 22195 **_Any volunteer who mails in more than 25 signatures post-marked by Feb. 1st will receive a free Stewart for Senate T-Shirt and Bumper Sticker!_** Win a free dinner with Corey and his wife, Maria, at his home! The top 5 volunteers who turn in the most signatures by the March 10th deadline will win. BUT - you must enter here to win >>> [Dinner_with_Corey](et%20your%20signature%20forms%20notarized%20at%20your%20local%20bank%20or%20post%20off) REMEMBER - You do not have to turn them all at once. All volunteer signatures will count to their personal total. We ask that you turn your signatures in at our deadlines on Jan. 31st, Feb. 28th, and March 10th or once you have 50, whichever comes first. The 25 signatures for t-shirts WILL count to your dinner with Corey contest total should you enter the link above. Your signatures will ONLY count to your total if your signature form is:
1. POST marked by Feb. 1st for the t-shirt and March 10th for the Dinner
2. **Notarized, and**
3. Mailed in or turned into your regional director by the deadlines above.

Please email Heather Mitchell for further questions or guidance at Heather@CoreyStewart.com Best, Team Corey Stewart for Senate
[http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=signature_drive&n=5)

| | Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc.____

body:

It is important that Republicans spread the message of how the **Tax Cuts and Jobs Act** will be benefiting Granite Staters throughout 2018 and beyond.
We already know that 89% of New Hampshire will benefit in 2018 from **President Trump's comprehensive tax reform** \- _it is time we tell these stories. _
Meet Sandra from Colebrook. Sandra understands the impact a tax cut will have for her and people throughout her community.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: continuing the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
The events of the past week have reinforced what we all know -- Democrats MUST retake the Senate and House in 2018 to stop the damage and start to move this country forward again. In the meantime, we have to continue the fight.

Last week's budget standoff resulted in a Republican concession to finally allow a vote on a DACA bill in the Senate in the coming weeks -- a vote that we have known for months we have a decent shot at winning in the U.S. Senate if we have an outpouring of public support.

That means everyone who wants to see DREAMers treated fairly must join forces immediately to get a bipartisan DACA bill out of the Senate and to the House of Representatives in the next three weeks.

[**Sign on now. Tell Mitch McConnell to keep his word and allow the Senate to vote on a bipartisan bill providing security to DREAMers.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de9186d/70cdc2ba/46f2d7ee/3903f23/2102083270/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-demand-congress-protects-dreamers?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Sign+on+now+Tell+Mitch+McConnell+to+keep&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180125&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180125")

We know some House Republicans are already digging in their heels, refusing to go along with any bipartisan DACA bill emerging from the Senate.

Without even seeing the language in a DREAMers bill, these Republicans are threatening to do whatever they can to make sure it is dead-on-arrival in the House.

We can't let Republicans get away with this obstruction. Working together, we must rally a huge amount of public pressure to pass a bipartisan DREAMers bill.

Whether it's using social media, making phone calls, going to town halls, or sending letters, everyone who cares about protecting DREAMers must do everything possible to ensure that we move forward with a solution.

[**Urge Republicans to allow a vote on a bipartisan bill protecting DREAMers. Sign on here.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de9186d/70cdc2ba/46f2d7ee/3903f20/2102083270/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sign-demand-congress-protects-dreamers?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Urge+Republicans+to+allow+a+vote+on+a+bi&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180125&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180125")

Please take action now. We have less than three weeks.

Thank you for keeping up the fight.

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Will you join me in this fight, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Thanks to the power of women and our ability to organize a movement, the resistance showed up on day 1 of the Trump administration. And we need to continue this movement -- are you in?
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180125-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Friend, a year ago, the world changed.

I'm not talking about Donald Trump's inauguration. I'm talking about the day after -- the day five million of us took to the streets around the world. The Women's March jump-started a movement -- and called forth an unstoppable army for change.

We stood shoulder to shoulder and made it clear: We are here, we will not be silent, we will not roll over and play dead, and we will fight for what we believe in.

The crowds in Boston were like a giant family reunion. Women in pink hats. Men pushing strollers. Kids laughing and running. Babies and great-grannies. Hugs and laughter. And an ocean of signs -- colorful, clever, creative.

When I looked out over that sea of 175,000 dedicated, passionate people spilling out of Boston Common, and when I saw the photos of the rallies happening all over the country and around the world, I felt hopeful. Because I knew that, together, we would make sure this day went down in history.

We knew this would be a hard fight. We knew that there would be dark moments. But we knew we didn't have to do this alone. Time and time again I've seen the Democratic women of the Senate bring the issues that matter to the forefront. We've spent every day fighting for what's right -- and so many of you have been right there alongside us.

But, friend, if we want to keep all our Democratic women Senators (including myself!) fighting on these issues, we need to make sure they're re-elected this year. That's why I'm asking you: **[Can I count on you to keep fighting alongside our Democratic women Senators? Simply chip in $1 to the Women's Senate Network to help our Senators get the job done.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180125-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Last year, we were so loud that nobody -- not even Donald Trump -- could ignore us. We sent a powerful message that we won't back down, and we won't be quiet.

**It 's time to be loud again, friend, and make sure everyone knows we're still out here, we're still fired up, and we will persist. Chip in to the Women's Senate Network today >>**

[**http://www.dscc.org/keep-persisting-together**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180125-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks for being a part of this. We're in this together,

Elizabeth

120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d612/2b07114c/bd85c8f5/731be9ac/4173612404/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d612/2b07114c/bd85c8f5/731be9af/4173612404/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d612/2b07114c/bd85c8f5/731be9ae/4173612404/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Judicial History was made because of you
body:
Dear Peter,
In a recent My Faith Votes survey many of you told us there were two issues, in particular, directing your vote in the 2018-midterm primary:
1. Protecting people of faith to freely practice their religion
2. Protecting the most fundamental and basic human right, the right to life

The first line of defense on both of these issues is our judicial system. **And the elections this year will be critical if we hope to put justices on the bench who uphold Biblical values**.
**[That’s why I’m asking for you to make a commitment TODAY to stand for our values.](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p180125apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180125apl01nd&n=1)**
In 2017 President Trump appointed and the Senate confirmed 19 new federal judges including a record 12 appellate court positions. President Trump’s administration confirmed more in the first year than any administration since 1891 when the circuit courts were created!
These court appointments will translate into more victories for the most basic fundamental human right to life and protection of every American’s freedom to practice their religion.
**However, there are still 149 existing vacancies on the federal courts to be filled.**
The new Senators we elect this year will determine who is approved to fill these federal courts nationwide.
The plan to protect Judeo-Christian values is clear and straightforward. We must engage millions more Christians to stand united at the voting booth for Biblical values if we hope to create peace and prosperity in America.
**[I’m asking you to prayerfully consider partnering with My Faith Votes on a monthly basis to help us reach more Christians!](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/p180125apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180125apl01nd&n=2)**
Any amount makes a difference whether it’s a monthly donation of $10, $50 or $100!
Together, let’s ensure the most basic human rights of life and religious freedom are protected by our judicial system for generations to come.
**United. We Stand.**

Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180125apl01nd&n=3)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180125apl01nd&n=4).

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Tough journey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31e7/9e00690/434e4dfc/24039008/2803942990/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180125_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180125_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Hello,

Next Wednesday is the next major fundraising deadline of this campaign.

It's never been more urgent.

How we top off the first month of 2018 will set a precedent for the months to come -- and the Florida Governor's race is already getting national attention. It'll only get more heated from here.

**[We've got a tough journey ahead of us though, so I'm going to need your help to hit our $10,000 end-of-month goal -- so please, chip in $5 or whatever you can afford now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31e7/9e00690/434e4dfc/2403900b/2803942990/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018-eom?utm_campaign=em18_180125_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180125_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_content=2+-+Wersquove+got+a+tough+journey+ahead+of+u")**

Last week, I released my Fair Share for Florida's Future plan to get Trump's giveaways to the richest corporations back -- because I truly believe they must pay more of their fair share to make a difference for Florida families.

We have the opportunity to build world-class public schools, pay teachers the salaries they deserve, expand early childhood education, and ensure students and adults have access to SHOP 2.0 vocational training. There's a lot of work to be done here in Florida. But when people work together, anything is possible. And thanks to grassroots supporters like you, I'm more confident than ever that we can do it.

It's going to take an incredible amount of resources, hope, and determination to help rebuild Florida after Governor Rick Scott's eight years in office -- especially with Donald Trump in the White House. But Democrats across the country have shown that we're ready and able to flip districts, take back statehouses, and turn Governors' mansions blue.

And I know that we'll be next here in Florida, but only if I can count on you to help us hit our goal this month.

Andrew

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: One for the record books 📚
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6b83/24c69fd9/12d4a4e84/1895a843/2257638566/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEM44N_digital_email_20180125_BreakingRecords_inact&source=WQEFEM44N_digital_email_20180125_BreakingRecords_inact")
---

Peter,

This past year has been one for the record books -- literally.

Over 30,000 women have now reached out to us about running for office. And a record number of women are running for governors' seats and the House.

Whether or not all of this energy turns into record-breaking wins, though, depends on the resources this community sends to many of these candidates.

**[Donate $3 to support pro-choice Democratic women running for office and keep this momentum going into the 2018 elections.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6b83/24c69fd9/12d4a4e84/1895a87c/2257638566/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180125_email_BreakingRecords?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+support+prochoice+Democratic&utm_campaign=WQEFEM44N_digital_email_20180125_BreakingRecords_inact&source=WQEFEM44N_digital_email_20180125_BreakingRecords_inact")**

All of these women putting their names on the ballot and the grassroots enthusiasm to elect them has forced us to think even bigger.

We're targeting 598 state legislative seats -- our largest state effort yet.

And while Republicans spent the last year continuing to attack health care, equal pay, and abortion access, we broke another record: launching our biggest "On Notice" opposition program ever.

This year our mission is nothing short of a sea change. But to make it happen, it means every single one of us has to step up.

**Donate $3 to continue helping to elect pro-choice Democratic women:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Keep-the-Momentum-Going](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6b83/24c69fd9/12d4a4e84/1895a87d/2257638566/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180125_email_BreakingRecords?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgKeeptheMomentumG&utm_campaign=WQEFEM44N_digital_email_20180125_BreakingRecords_inact&source=WQEFEM44N_digital_email_20180125_BreakingRecords_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List
